parityMeta.describes: SmartReplacement parity — the canonical real-data path: a bare currentExercise id ('bench-press') with no extra context. Candidates are seeded entirely from the committed exercise library (the bench-press knowledge override's own alternativeIds + alternativePriorities, the horizontal-press equivalence chain, and shared-muscle/movement-pattern similars), so the golden pins the engine's natural output against frozen library data.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic SmartReplacementParams. No readiness / pain / feedback / equipment context — purely the bench-press knowledge override + equivalence chain + similar-exercise scan. Clockless engine, generatedAtPolicy 'none'.
